blocks.text: Bernabéu Beckons: Europe's Night Begins with Madrid vs Bayern

Tuesday's Champions League double-header is the marquee draw — Real Madrid host Bayern in a rivalry for the ages, while Arsenal chase history in Lisbon. But Monday sets the stage with La Liga's European race tightening.
⚽ Villarreal at Girona — third-place Villarreal push to hold off Atlético in the Europa League hunt
🚴 Scheldeprijs 2026 — Søren Wærenskjold sprints for Norwegian glory in the Belgian classics sequence
